case_title: SUZANNE GEISLER VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNICIPAL et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO DEFTS DEMURREER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEISLER, SUZANNE
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS TO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNICIPAL TRANSPORTATION AGENCY) A PUBLIC ENTITY

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THERE IS A DISPUTE REGARDING WHETHER DEFENDANT COMPLIED WITH THE STATUTORY SERVICE REQUIREMENTS AND IT WOULD BE PREMATURE TO RESOLVE THAT ISSUE AT THIS STAGE OF THE PROCEEDINGS. SEE CRUZ V. COUNTY OF LA (1985) 173 CAL.APP.3D 1131. ANSWER TO BE FILED WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MICHAEL J. MANDEL, TEL. NO. 626-5400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. There is a dispute regarding whether defendant complied with the statutory service requirements and it would be premature to resolve that issue at this stage of the proceedings. See Cruz v. County of LA (1985) 173 Cal.App.3d 1131. ANSWER TO BE FILED WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
